gnomad.note: absent or extremely rare in population databases

literature.title: Assessment of splicing defects in BRCA1 and BRCA2 variants.
literature.abstract: Published splice-assay work cited by ClinVar supports evaluating intronic BRCA2 variants near exon boundaries for aberrant splicing.

literature.title: Classification of BRCA1 and BRCA2 variants by multifactorial likelihood analysis.
literature.abstract: Multifactorial BRCA1/2 variant analyses provide clinical and segregation context used in classifying rare splice-region variants.
